title: ExtractedClaim
description: A claim extracted from approved first-party site/product content, owned by claim-evidence-service. Effective-date versioned (superseded claims are retained, not deleted).
$comment: compat_class: closed, signed: false (non-signed closed contract, ADR-0024(b) family). Authority: docs/architecture/contract-catalog.md P1 table row 'ExtractedClaim | claim-evidence | claim_id; 유효일 버전 보존' (idempotency key claim_id; effective-date versioning preserved, not overwritten); docs/architecture/wave4-plan.md domain-contract candidate list; services/intelligence/claim-evidence-service/README.md ('claim extraction, evidence ledger'). entity_id is a plain opaque string reference to domain/entity-record.entity_id, NOT a cross-file $ref — this catalog's cross-file $ref convention restricts $ref targets to the common/ category only (tests/contract/validate/test_schema_conventions.py 'cross-file refs common-only'), so cross-domain linkage is carried as an opaque identifier value, not a schema reference. claim_text is bounded (maxLength) to avoid an unbounded raw-content field, consistent with the catalog's 'no raw content' security posture (cf. SourceSnapshot/PatchArtifact).

project_id.$comment: Project-scoped, consuming entity-resolution's project-scoped output (services/intelligence/claim-evidence-service/README.md upstream: entity-resolution-service).

claim_id.$comment: contract-catalog.md:39 idempotency key 'claim_id'. Opaque, mirrors common/identifiers/v1 opaque-id shape.

entity_id.$comment: Opaque reference to domain/entity-record.entity_id (plain string value, not a cross-file $ref — see $comment above on the common-only $ref convention).

claim_text.$comment: Extracted claim text from approved first-party content (public site content, not raw customer source). Bounded length — no unbounded raw-document field.

status.$comment: contract-catalog.md:39 '유효일 버전 보존' — superseded/retracted claims are retained (status transition), not deleted.

effective_from.$comment: Effective-date version start, per contract-catalog.md:39 '유효일 버전 보존'.
